title: Remove put stubs from read-only backends: env, bitwarden, wolfhsm, aws-kms
description: Delete the put method bodies from the 4 backends that cannot write. After secretx-core removes put from SecretStore, these stubs no longer satisfy a trait requirement and must be deleted. Also delete the put_returns_unavailable test in secretx-env (tests behavior being eliminated). Affects: secretx-env/src/lib.rs, secretx-bitwarden/src/lib.rs, secretx-wolfhsm/src/lib.rs, secretx-aws-kms/src/lib.rs. Each: remove the async fn put body from impl SecretStore. None add a WriteableSecretStore impl. Run cargo test for each crate.
